macro_fed.nota: Segui la Fed en Investing.com para datos en tiempo real.

noticias.titulo: Dow Sinks 400 Points After UAE Says It Detects Missiles From Iran
noticias.resumen: The Dow fell 400 points as oil prices spiked again. The Dow was down 417 points, or 0.8%. The S&P 500 was down 0.5%. The Nasdaq was down 0.5%. The S&P and Nasdaq were trading higher earlier in the morning.

noticias.titulo: Iran shock affecting firms differently, not sectors

noticias.titulo: Advanced Micro Devices Stock Is Downgraded Before Earnings. Chip Supply Is a Problem.
noticias.resumen: HSBC downgrades Advanced Micro Devices stock to Hold from Buy in a research note ahead of the company’s earnings report Tuesday.
